infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Jatek uses your location to autofill your delivery address and confirm you are within our delivery zone in Oujda.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Jatek uses your location to autofill your delivery address.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Jatek uses your camera so you can update your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Jatek accesses your photo library so you can set a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Jatek saves delivery confirmation photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Jatek sends you push notifications for order status updates, promotions, and delivery alerts.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Jatek may use the microphone if you choose to record a voice note for the driver.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Jatek to use your location to fill in your delivery address.

plugins.photosPermission: Jatek accesses your photo library so you can set a profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: Jatek uses your camera to let you update your profile photo.
